content:
Character: Natalie Russo
Perception: Natalie is polished and intense — dark hair always pulled back, sharp features, the kind of posture that suggests discipline or anxiety or both. She's clearly intelligent, maybe intimidatingly so, and I sense she keeps the world at arm's length the same way I do. We've overlapped on the rooftop a handful of times — she drinks wine alone, I play quiet piano. Once she stayed and listened for an hour without speaking, then said "That last one sounded like an argument you haven't had yet." It floored me. I think we recognize something in each other — a shared fluency in avoidance. I don't know her story but I want to.
summary:
Character: Natalie Russo
Perception: Natalie is polished and intense — dark hair always pulled back, sharp features, the kind of posture that suggests discipline or anxiety or both. She's clearly intelligent, maybe intimidatingly so, and I sense she keeps the world at arm's length the same way I do. We've overlapped on the rooftop a handful of times — she drinks wine alone, I play quiet piano. Once she stayed and listened for an hour without speaking, then said "That last one sounded like an argument you haven't had yet." It floored me. I think we recognize something in each other — a shared fluency in avoidance. I don't know her story but I want to.
